name: Beer-Batter Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the tomato slices on a piece of waxed paper.
2. Season both sides of the tomatoes with 1 teaspoon of salt and pepper.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and 1 teaspoon of salt.
4. Set aside half of this mixture on a piece of waxed paper.
5. Dip the tomato slices in the flour mixture on the waxed paper.
6. In another bowl, stir together beer and lemon juice with the remaining flour mixture until it foams and resembles pancake batter.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet.
8. Carefully dip each tomato slice into the batter, then fry in hot oil.
9. Cook half of the tomatoes at a time until golden brown.
10. Repeat with the remaining tomatoes.
